events.event_description: First U.S. diplomatic representation to Comoros established when nonresident Chargé d'Affaires ad interim Robert South Barrett presented credentials, operating from Antananarivo.

evidence.quote: Robert South Barrett, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Credentials presented: 1977-08-15. Left Antananarivo 1980-06.

events.event_description: Status elevated to nonresident Ambassador when Fernando Enrique Rondon, the first Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary accredited to Comoros, presented credentials while based in Antananarivo.

evidence.quote: Fernando Enrique Rondon, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1982-09-23. Credentials presented: 1982-11-18. Left Antananarivo 1983-05-25.

events.event_description: Embassy Moroni established with Edward Brynn as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim, while Robert Brendon Keating continued as nonresident Ambassador.

evidence.quote: Note: During Keating's tenure as non-resident Ambassador, Embassy Moroni was established August 26, 1985 with Edward Brynn as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

events.event_description: Embassy Moroni closed, reverting to nonresident Ambassador status; ambassadors continued to be accredited to Comoros from Port Louis.

evidence.quote: [Mission Note] Embassy Moroni was closed on September 30, 1993.
